nodes.name: Identify Client
nodes.notes: Lookup client by channel ID (whatsapp_id, messenger_id, telegram_id, phone). If not found, create new client.

nodes.name: Load Conversation History
nodes.notes: Load last 10 messages from active conversation for context

nodes.name: Check Availability
nodes.notes: Get available slots for requested date/practitioner

nodes.name: Sanitize Prompt Inputs
nodes.notes: ASI01 defense: sanitize all user-controlled data before Gemini prompt injection. Strips injection patterns, truncates fields, coerces numerics.

nodes.name: Gemini AI
nodes.notes: Call Gemini 2.5 Flash with sanitized conversation context, available slots, and client history. Returns structured JSON with response_text and optional booking_data.

nodes.name: Booking Action?
nodes.notes: Route based on Gemini's action: confirm_booking → create booking, cancel_booking → cancel, else → just reply

nodes.name: Create Booking
nodes.notes: POST /api/v1/bookings — creates the booking in Supabase

nodes.name: Send Reply
nodes.notes: Send AI response back to client via their original channel

nodes.name: Save AI Message
nodes.notes: Persist AI response in messages table for dashboard visibility
